nasb.text: Which of these three do you think proved to be a neighbor to the man who fell into the robbers’ hands?”

esv.text: Which of these three, do you think, proved to be a neighbor to the man who fell among the robbers?”

cnv.text: 你想，這三個人，誰是那個落在強盜手中的人的鄰舍呢？”

ccb.text: 那么，你认为这三个人中谁是被劫者的邻居呢？”

csbs.text: “你认为，这三个人中，哪一个是落在强盗手中那人的邻人呢？”
